plot outline: The curse of The Headless Horseman (Christopher Walken) is the legacy of the small town of Sleepy Hollow. Spearheaded by the eager Constable Ichabod Crane (Johnny Depp) and his new world ways into the quagmire of secrets and murder, secrets once laid to rest, best forgotten and now reawakened, and he too, holding a dark secret of a past once gone.
title: Sleepy Hollow
akas: Sleepy Hollow: La légende du cavalier sans tête (France)

distributors.name: HBO Pacific Partners of Netherlands Antilles
